raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding Citibanks handling of my credit card dispute ( Dispute ID XXXX for {$26.00} filled on XX/XX/year>, Order XXXX with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 
On XX/XX/year>, I received my order and immediately reported that one of the dolls arrived damaged/defective. I provided clear photos on the same day. 
I repeatedly contacted the merchant with no response. The reply came on XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year>, all unrelated to my claim. 

The merchant has never resolved my issue despite repeated attempts and sufficient evidence. 

I had sent all the support documents including emails recorded with merchant, pictures of defective items and order confirmation to Citibank. Citibank denied my dispute based on the merchants claim of package delivered and a generic email I never received, which was about a missing package completely unrelated to my defective merchandise claim.
